story.text:
# 💡 Cousin Blades
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Two blades from same ceremony that rhyme but never match. Neither identical nor unrelated. Proof of dual sovereignty preserved through shared traversal.
> *The two formations will not match. They are not supposed to match. They are supposed to rhyme.*
